title: Budgeting in Monday
excerpt: ‪Anyone using Monday for budgeting? Tried to share the wonders of Monday w/ my team. They are determined to stick w/ Google Sheets. I, on the other hand, am determined to do practically everything in Monday. Might lose t…

posts.author: GadgetGirl (TK Aoaeh)
posts.cookedHtml:
‪Anyone using Monday for budgeting? Tried to share the wonders of Monday w/ my team. They are determined to stick w/ Google Sheets. I, on the other hand, am determined to do practically everything in Monday. Might lose this battle though. #OldSchoolNewSchool‬

Any templates? Any tips on convincing colleagues to give it a shot?

posts.author: Kacey-monday.com (Kacey )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @GadgetGirl! While we don’t have any templates for budgeting, I’d love to help make a board for you! Can you tell me some more details about what you’re trying to budget? Is this for a single project, or more of a monthly department budget? Looking forward to your reply!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @GadgetGirl, we’ll also touch on budgeting for projects in the advanced project management webinar which is happening tomorrow: https://monday.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_L89l7uvRTHCWodg-jofOKw

posts.author: Wotan (Christian Sist)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia,

in fact I would be most interested in this as well.
I started already by creating a table where I can enter all due payments and incomes and then summarize them in a calendar view in my dashboard.
However, I would like to create an entire cash-flow table.
Right now I am a bit confused with the “formula” column as it does not seem to work in the same way as in Numbers or Excel.

Any advice or video/webinar that you can offer?

Thanks!
C.

PS. We are using monday now since about a month and it is the first project management tool that works how I think. Thanks for that!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Wotan,

Sure thing! Here’s the link for the recording. If it doesn’t answer your needs then just let us know and we’ll be happy to help here.

Cheers

posts.author: BlueAvenue (Zain Dhonré)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia,

A cashflow table would be awesome but it seems that the links no longer work, probably because of the months that have passed :). Is this webinar still available?

Kind regards,

Zain

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Link provided is dead link. I’m also curious to watch the recording. Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Wotan, @Jaewoo, @BlueAvenue, and @GadgetGirl

Could you try the following link? Let me know how it goes!

Zoom recording

posts.author: Klink (Kalmia)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d also love to watch it

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I need help with creating a budgeting board too, and it would be for a monthly department budget. Can you assist me?

Thanks!
Tie

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: @Kacey-monday.com did you see my note above from April 21, 2021? I could still (desperately) use your help. Thanks!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @asktiedavis

Dani here stepping in for the team!

I’d be happy to help you with this!
I recommend starting out by checking this article: How Can I Manage My Budget with monday.com?

We also have a couple of templates you might like to try out!
